statistical_anchor: NVDA’s +4.20% move to $204.12 (position 1.0) occurs below the $209.38 50-day MA on only 0.92x average volume, indicating a high-probability mean-reversion or consolidation phase over the next 3–5 sessions.
volume_assessment: The +4.20% price expansion is backed by thin tape noise (0.92x of the 30-day average) rather than conviction volume; without volume expansion, the move lacks the liquidity depth to sustain momentum past immediate resistance.
trend_assessment: Price sits at the 10-day high with a streak of 0, confirming a single-session bounce rather than trend continuation. Momentum is neutral-to-exhausted as it approaches the $209.38 50-day MA from below without reclaiming it.
regime_context: VIX at 16.9 and stable 10Y yields at 4.2% establish a normal volatility regime where unconfirmed breakouts typically face immediate profit-taking within 3–5 sessions as liquidity providers sell into strength without volume follow-through.
watch_items: Price closes above $209.38 with volume >1.2x the 30-day average
Price breaks below $198.00 on elevated volume, targeting a retest of the $192.53 range low
